question: Which machine learning algorithms are reported in empirical papers that mention precision as a machine learning metric?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?algorithm WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?analysis .
  ?analysis orkgp:P57016 ?ml .
  ?ml orkgp:P2006 ?metric .
  ?metric orkgp:P3004 ?precision .
  ?ml orkgp:P2001 ?algorithm .
}

question: What exact names of data collection methods are reported in empirical papers that collect quantitative data?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?method_name_label WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data .
  ?data orkgp:P7055 ?data_type .
  ?data_type orkgp:P57039 ?quantitative .
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
  ?method orkgp:P145012 ?method_name .
  ?method_name rdfs:label ?method_name_label .
}

question: How many empirical papers report external validity threats?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P39099 ?threats .
  ?threats orkgp:P55034 ?external_validity .
}

question: In which publication years do empirical papers report an alternative hypothesis?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56043 ?inferential .
  ?inferential orkgp:P30001 ?hypothesis .
  ?hypothesis orkgp:P41703 ?hypothesis_type .
  ?hypothesis_type orkgp:P35107 ?alternative_hypothesis .
}

question: What hypothesis statements are reported in empirical papers that use inferential statistics?

PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?hypothesis_statement WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?analysis .
  ?analysis orkgp:P56043 ?inferential .
  ?inferential orkgp:P30001 ?hypothesis .
  ?hypothesis orkgp:P56046 ?hypothesis_statement .
}

question: Which venue series are reported for empirical papers that mention a highlighted research question?

PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>

  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P37330 ?rq .
  ?rq orkgp:P55039 ?highlighted_in_text .
  ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue .
}

question: What labels are reported for research question answers that are hidden in the text in empirical papers?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?answer_label WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P57004 ?rq_answer .
  ?rq_answer orkgp:P55038 ?hidden_in_text .
  ?rq_answer rdfs:label ?answer_label .
}

  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .

question: What exact method names are reported for data analysis in empirical papers that mention descriptive statistics?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?analysis_method_label WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?analysis .
  ?analysis orkgp:P1005 ?analysis_method .
  ?analysis_method rdfs:label ?analysis_method_label .
  ?analysis orkgp:P56048 ?descriptive_statistic .
}

question: Which statistical techniques are reported in empirical papers that include inferential statistics?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>

  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?analysis .
